description: Canonical source of truth for the create-loop slash commands. The standalone installer (bin/create-loop.js) and the render step generate host-specific command files (.opencode/command/*.md, .claude/commands/*.md) from these entries. Edit commands HERE, then run `create-loop render` to regenerate the committed host artifacts.

commands.description: Create a new create-loop control plan from a fuzzy goal — runs the Charter interview and emits loop.plan v0 (Mode A).
Advance an existing create-loop by executing the next ready node(s) (Mode B).
Resume a create-loop from its checkpoint in a fresh session after interruption (Mode C).
Show a create-loop status snapshot — goal, current node, ready set, blockers, next action (read-only).
